QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: diskLoggingEnabled
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Write application log messages to disk in Logs directory.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Enable

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: diskLoggingMaxFileSizeMB
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Maximum size of a single log file in megabytes before rotation.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Max File Size (MB)

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: diskLoggingMaxBackupFiles
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Number of rotated backup log files to keep.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Max Backup Files

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: saveFormat
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: File format used when saving the application log.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Save Format
